_comment: Causal Rules Dictionary — Phase 1 Knowledge Layer
_comment2: Neo4j ki jagah. Sirf rules. Pre-loaded to Redis at 9:00 AM.
_comment3: Add rules yahan. System automatically use karega.

CRUDE_RISE_3PCT.note: Crude rise = inflation pressure = bank margin risk

CRUDE_FALL_3PCT.note: Crude fall = input cost benefit for consumers

USDINR_RISE_1PCT.note: Rupee weakening = IT earners benefit (USD revenue)

USDINR_FALL_1PCT.note: Rupee strengthening = IT revenue shrinks in INR

FII_SELL_2000CR.note: Large FII selling = index pressure next 1-2 sessions

VIX_ABOVE_20.note: VIX > 20 = elevated fear = widen stops, reduce size

VIX_ABOVE_25.note: VIX > 25 = danger zone = kill switch watching

VIX_SPIKE_20PCT_30MIN.note: Sudden VIX spike = unknown news event = wait

BOND_YIELD_RISE_10BPS.note: Rising yields = rate hike fear = growth stocks re-rate

RBI_DOVISH_SURPRISE.note: Dovish RBI = rate cut hopes = rate-sensitive sectors up

GOLD_RISE_2PCT.note: Gold rising fast = global risk-off = FII may sell India

AD_RATIO_BELOW_0_5.note: Breadth failure. Index up but most stocks down = distribution

SGX_NIFTY_GAP_DOWN_1PCT.note: Gap down opening = volatile first 15 min = wait for stabilization

US_MARKET_DOWN_1PCT_OVERNIGHT.note: Global sell-off overnight = India opens weak = wait

BUDGET_DAY.note: Budget day = extreme volatility = trading blocked

RBI_POLICY_DAY.note: RBI policy = binary outcome = no trades before announcement

FNO_EXPIRY_DAY.note: Expiry day = gamma squeezes = erratic moves = careful

CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LOWER.note: Market circuit breaker = halt all trading

BANKNIFTY_IT_DIVERGE.note: BankNifty and IT going opposite = index unreliable = wait
